title: Os Scissum - Split Bone
description: Enhance your Minecraft experience with this rustic bone block texture pack, featuring six unique variations and natural, rotated placements.
body:
Immerse yourself in a more dynamic and rustic Minecraft world with this Bone Block Texture Pack. Offering six unique bone block variants, each with a distinct, hand-crafted appearance, this pack enhances the natural aesthetic of the game. With a system that automatically rotates the block when placed sideways, the texture pack ensures a more organic and varied look, perfect for builders looking to create a realistic, worn-down atmosphere. Whether you're designing ancient ruins, underground caves, or just adding detail to your world, this pack brings an extra layer of creativity and realism to your Minecraft experience.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
